_comment: Atlas timeline moment markers (V2 plan §10). Times are canonical battle-clock seconds (t=0 = 13:00 local, clock.startTime 46800). Every marker cites the claim or editorial decision that places it — reconstruction/claims/angle.claims.json and docs/reconstruction/angle-editorial-decisions.md; a marker without provenance is an invented time and MomentSet.FromJson rejects it.

moments.label: Bombardment opens
moments.detail: The Confederate cannonade opens along Seminary Ridge — 13:00 by Alexander's watch, 13:07 by Jacobs's; the spread is kept, not reconciled.

moments.label: The charge steps off
moments.detail: Pickett's division steps off from Seminary Ridge — the canonical ~15:05 framing from which the slice arithmetic runs; witness step-off readings disagree by over an hour.

moments.label: Crossing the Emmitsburg Road
moments.detail: Garnett's line reaches the road and its rail fences under fire — the hero Soldier View window opens here (15:16).

moments.label: Closing under canister
moments.detail: The final 400 meters: Union batteries convert to canister as the division closes on the wall (~15:20).
moments.citation: step-off-arithmetic frame (docs/reconstruction/angle-editorial-decisions.md; ephemeris anchor 15:20 = t=8400); casualty intensity claim-cas-garnett-total distribution

moments.label: At the stone wall
moments.detail: The approach reaches the wall held by Webb's Philadelphia Brigade; the 69th Pennsylvania stands at the wall south of the Angle (~15:23).

moments.label: The Angle crisis
moments.detail: Armistead crosses the wall at the Angle (~15:25); the canonical crossing envelope is 8640–8760.

moments.label: Repulse
moments.detail: The breach collapses; survivors fall back toward Seminary Ridge (~15:27). The hero Soldier View window closes here.
moments.citation: claim-repulse-clock-frames (step-off-arithmetic frame, ~15:25 climax; collapse transition per angle-editorial-decisions.md)
